compiled_state.title: [test-figma-pullback-integration.sh]: pre-existing failure -> validate.sh --ci flagged
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

tests/.../test-figma-pullback-integration.sh fails when run via validate.sh / test-batched.sh.

## Symptom
figma-merge.sh and figma-id-validate.sh missing

## Reproduction
bash tests/[hooks|scripts|integration]/test-figma-pullback-integration.sh

## Context
Discovered while running validate.sh --ci to unblock scripts/release.sh.
CI on origin/main is GREEN. After fix 7225-7708 (bash-runner.sh honors
SUITE_TEST_INDEX RED markers), the failure remains because no RED marker
exists for these specific function-level failures.

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). RED-state TDD test for unimplemented figma-merge.sh + figma-id-validate.sh (see header lines 11-13 + REVIEW-DEFENSE 15-21). Fix: register in .test-index with RED marker; reformat 6 printf lines so red-zone parser can extract test function names.
comments.author: Test
